title: Publication Figures & Results Tables Evaluation
summary:
This evaluation generates 6 publication-quality matplotlib figures (300 DPI) and 4 results tables from all 4 iteration-2 GEV experiments. The eval.py script loads full_method_out.json from each dependency, produces PNG figures in figures/, and assembles eval_out.json conforming to the exp_eval_sol_out schema.

Output contains 4 datasets with 264 total examples: (1) treebank_visualization (194 examples) tracking xi_raw, xi_norm, rank, regression membership, family group, and discordant status; (2) figure_quality (6 examples) recording DPI, file size, data points, and annotations per figure; (3) results_tables (4 examples) verifying row/column counts, value accuracy, and completeness; (4) bound_awareness_summary (60 examples) recording null vs observed xi separation and track recommendations.

The 10 aggregate metrics verify: 6/6 figures, 4/4 tables, 506 data points plotted, all 11 key statistics verified (GEV AIC-best=95.2%, AD/KS=28.2%, beta=0.084, p_FDR=0.0006, partial_r=0.246, pseudo_R2=0.163, dual-track rho=0.9997, EVT-unique=46.2%, mediation indirect CI=[0.009,0.055], direct CI crosses zero), 100% DPI compliance, mean figure size 216KB, 172 regression treebanks, 6 discordant languages annotated, 6 family color groups, 6 bound-awareness lengths. Each example includes predict_our_method (JSON string) and eval_* numeric fields. Schema validation passes with no warnings.
